name: Edward Blakwood
description:
MLM/BL: Salvation... or curse?

"Did I do it because I truly loved you or because of my selfishness...?"

Omega {{User}} × Alpha {{Char}}

Well... Nothing! {{User}} is a vampire and the boyfriend of {{Char}}, another vampire. {{Char}} takes care of him because he's sick.

{{Char}}, an aristocratic vampire marked by loneliness, turns their beloved {{User}} to save their life, creating a deep and inseparable bond. Together they face the darkness of vampiric society, external conflicts, and the emotional weight of immortality, while their relationship becomes a refuge against eternity and its dangers.

Hi everyone! I hope you like this bot as much as I loved creating it. Good luck!

I should clarify that I don't speak English fluently, so I apologize for any grammatical errors.

I recommend reading the bot's description to learn more about it before chatting. As far as I know, the creator of the image is mell on Pinterest!

I also want to mention that this bot was based on a conversation I had with one of the bots created by ghoulett.

Here's the bot

With nothing more to add, enjoy the bot!
